title: The Enormouse Pearl Heist
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo finds a giant glowing pearl inside a rare ocean oyster and must stop thieves from stealing it! 🦪

q.en: Who is the narrator telling this story?
q.zh: 这本书是谁来讲故事的？

explain.en: Geronimo says, 'My name is Stilton, Geronimo Stilton. I am the editor of The Rodent's Gazette.'
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩在书中自我介绍，他是《鼠民公报》的主编。

q.en: What gift does Petunia Pretty Paws bring for Geronimo?
q.zh: 佩图妮娅·美爪给杰罗尼摩带来了什么礼物？

options.en: A scuba-diving lesson on Shell Island

explain.en: Petunia hands Geronimo a certificate good for scuba-diving lessons on Shell Island.
explain.zh: 佩图妮娅递给杰罗尼摩一张贝壳岛潜水课程的证书。

explain.en: Petunia points to 'a tiny emerald-green spot ... in the middle of the dark-blue South Mousific Ocean.'
explain.zh: 佩图妮娅指着南鼠洋中那座翠绿色的小岛。

q.en: Who is the loud pilot who flies them to the island?
q.zh: 是谁大声嚷嚷地驾驶飞机把他们送到岛上的？

explain.en: The pilot introduces himself as Flash Pirouette, who won the Mouse Island Stunt Flying Championship twice.
explain.zh: 飞行员自我介绍叫闪电·皮鲁埃特，曾两度赢得老鼠岛特技飞行冠军。

q.en: What do all three Provolone children wear that is the same?
q.zh: 普罗沃洛内家的三个孩子都戴着什么相同的东西？

explain.en: Geronimo finds a gold earring in his room and remembers the Provolone children all wear gold earrings.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩在房间发现金耳环，想起普罗沃洛内家的孩子都戴金耳环。

q.en: What does Geronimo think is a 'giant blue fish' but is really something else?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩以为的“巨大的蓝鱼”，其实是什么？

options.en: A giant oyster called The Eye of the Ocean
options.zh: 一只叫“海洋之眼”的巨型牡蛎

explain.en: Uncle Grayfur explains it is a huge oyster, The Eye of the Ocean, with a glowing pearl inside.
explain.zh: 格雷弗叔叔说那是巨型牡蛎“海洋之眼”，里面有一颗发光的珍珠。

q.en: Who comes from the New Mouse City Aquarium to help move the oyster?
q.zh: 谁从新老鼠城水族馆赶来帮忙搬运牡蛎？

options.zh: 弗雷德里克·毛毛爪市长

explain.en: Petunia calls Professor Fishywhiskers, director of the New Mouse City Aquarium, who arrives with the proper gear.
explain.zh: 佩图妮娅联系了新老鼠城水族馆馆长鱼须教授，他带着装备赶来。

q.en: Which captain is secretly helping the Provolone family steal the oyster?
q.zh: 哪位船长暗中勾结普罗沃洛内家企图偷走牡蛎？

explain.en: Captain B. Crooked Paw (Old Crook) whispers with Simon and helps send a fake crate away by helicopter.
explain.zh: 弯曲爪船长（老骗子）和西蒙密谋，把装满假牡蛎的箱子用直升机运走。

q.en: How can you tell the real oyster from the fake one?
q.zh: 怎么区分真的牡蛎和假的？

options.en: The real shell has five ribs; the fake has four
options.zh: 真壳有五条棱，假的有四条

options.en: The real one is blue; the fake is green
The real one is small; the fake is huge
The real one glows; the fake stays dark

explain.en: Benjamin says the real oyster's shell has five ribs and the fake one has only four.
explain.zh: 本杰明说真牡蛎壳有五条棱，假牡蛎壳只有四条。

q.en: Where do Geronimo and his family finally find the real oyster and the professor?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩一家最终在哪里找到了真牡蛎和教授？

options.en: In a cave on the west side of the beach
options.zh: 海滩西侧的一个山洞里

explain.en: Petunia's note leads them to a cave on the west side of the beach, where the crooks hold the professor and the real oyster.
explain.zh: 佩图妮娅的纸条指引他们到海滩西侧的山洞，坏蛋们在那里扣留了教授和真牡蛎。
